Head of Personnel Department

ABOUT US

We can define our personnel policy as placing qualified people in the right job in line with the goals and strategies of our university, evaluating their performance with the performance management system, conducting norm staffing studies related to appointment and internal promotion, making career planning and being the most preferred University to work by ensuring employee belonging.

Vision of the Department of Personnel:

-To be the most preferred and desired institution among universities

Mission of Personnel Department:

• To create personnel policies and practices that will contribute to the achievement of university goals,

• To recruit new individuals who will elevate university values with an effective recruitment process,

• To create a result-oriented and fast decision-making organizational structure and to establish highly competent employees at every level supporting it,

• To implement a competitive, correct salary and benefits policy,

• To contribute to the achievement of the main goals of the university by supporting the success and continuous development of employees through a target-based management model,

• To increase employee satisfaction and commitment to the university, the greatest factor in the continuous success of the university,

• To identify needs in line with university goals and take necessary actions for career development plans,

• To be innovative in developing new practices,

Our aim in the recruitment process is to select people who have the values and principles of our university, our main competencies that our employees should have, and the competencies related to the position and to place them in appropriate positions.

The recruitment function at our university is carried out under the headings of administrative recruitment and academic recruitment.

Our Team

Recep AKBULUT - Head of Personnel Department

Melek BUŞ - Senior Specialist

Merve ÇAVUŞOĞULLARI - Specialist

Gozde ÇAYIRLI - Office Worker (General)

RECRUITMENT

ACADEMIC RECRUITMENT

Research Assistant, Lecturer, Assistant Professor, Associate Professor and Professor appointments are made in line with the legislation and regulations of the Council of Higher Education in order to be assigned to various positions in the Departments and Programs of the Vocational Schools and Faculties of our University. Academic recruitment at our university is carried out in two separate categories as Full-Time Faculty Member and Hourly Paid Lecturers.

For Academic Staff Job Opportunities; www.galata.edu.tr

ADMINISTRATIVE RECRUITMENT

Recruitment via Career Sites

Our recruitment process is managed by taking into account the need for employees planned periodically at our university. It is aimed to bring people with competencies compatible with our

university culture to our university and to maximize the job satisfaction of employees in this direction.

Recruitment to our university is made through advertisements on career websites. You can follow our announcements.

Internal Job Posting

You can follow and apply for open positions in our administrative staff via www.yenibiriş.com, and open positions in our academic staff via www.galata.edu.tr

Orientation

Our orientation program aims for administrative employees to get to know our university, their jobs and their teammates in a shorter period of time and to feel that they belong to the “GALATA FAMILY”.

TALENT MANAGEMENT

Performance Management

At our university, the annual goals of our administrative employees are determined and their individual goals and competencies are evaluated at the end of the period through position-based performance evaluation and development plans.

Training

Through the performance evaluation system; it is aimed to review the success level of our university employees, to identify areas of development by evaluating the performance of employees and to improve these areas through training and development opportunities.

It is one of our priority goals to evaluate the opportunities that will arise in line with the organizational needs of our university, to develop our employees, and to create contingency plans.

In line with this goal, talent management programs are implemented for administrative employees. Through these practices, the career development of employees is supported, and contingency plans are realized.

Our talent management system progresses in line with the performance evaluation process.

In our salary & benefits policy, we aim to provide quality, fast, and communicative service in all processes covering personnel and salary management from the beginning of employment.

OTHER SERVICES

Occupational Health and Safety

It is aimed to ensure that all hazards and risks are identified, prioritized and managed appropriately at our university. Employees are provided with basic occupational health and safety trainings and trainings in accordance with their job descriptions and the participation of our employees in evaluation studies is ensured.

Performance Management

At our university, annual goals are set for our administrative staff, and at the end of the period, individual goals and competencies are evaluated through position-based performance evaluations and development plans.

Training

Through the performance evaluation system, we aim to review the success levels of our university staff, assess their performance, and identify areas for improvement, which will be developed through training and development opportunities.

Evaluating opportunities that arise in line with the organizational needs of our university and developing our employees are among our primary goals.

In line with this goal, talent management programs are implemented for our administrative staff to identify potential employees who will carry our university into the future and support their development. Through these practices, employees' career development is supported, and succession plans are realized.

Our talent management system progresses in alignment with the performance evaluation process.

Compensation & Benefits

In our Compensation & Benefits policy, we aim to provide a high-quality, fast, and communicative service in all processes that begin with recruitment and cover all personnel and compensation management.

Frequently Asked Questions

How are the Academic Recruitment processes conducted?

Appointments for Research Assistants, Instructors, Assistant Professors, Associate Professors, and Professors are made in accordance with the Higher Education Council regulations and guidelines to serve in various positions in the departments and programs of our Vocational School and Faculties. At our university, academic recruitment is carried out in two categories: Full-Time Faculty Members and Part-Time Instructors. For Academic Job Opportunities, click here: www.galata.edu.tr

How are the Administrative Recruitment processes conducted?

Recruitment Through Career Websites

Our recruitment process is managed by considering the employee needs that are planned periodically. Our goal is to bring individuals with competencies that align with our university culture and to maximize employee job satisfaction.

Recruitment for our university is done through job postings on career websites. You can follow our announcements.

Internal Posting You can follow and apply for open administrative positions through www.yenibiriş.com and open academic positions through www.galata.edu.tr

About Us

Our Vision:

• To be the most preferred and desired institution to work at among universities.

Our Mission:

• To establish personnel policies and practices that contribute to achieving the university's goals,

• To employ new individuals who will enhance the university's values through an efficient recruitment process,

• To create a results-oriented and fast decision-making organizational structure, supported by highly competent employees at every level,

• To implement a competitive and accurate compensation and benefits policy,

• To contribute to the university’s primary goals by supporting employee success and continuous development through a goal-based management model,

• To increase employee satisfaction and loyalty, which is the most significant factor in the university’s continuous success,

• To identify needs in line with the university’s objectives and take necessary actions towards career development plans,

• To be innovative in developing new practices,

The purpose of our recruitment process is to select individuals who align with the university’s values and principles, possess the core competencies expected from our employees, and the specific competencies required for the position, placing them in suitable roles.

At our university, the recruitment function is carried out under the categories of administrative recruitment and academic recruitment.

Occupational Health and Safety

At our university, it is aimed to ensure that all hazards and risks are identified, prioritized, and managed appropriately. Employees are provided with basic occupational health and safety training as well as job-specific training, ensuring their participation in evaluation activities.
